description: Matched D16 launch-day smoke for the max-of-two cross-lane fee-cap correction. Seeds 0-9, 2,000 slots, load profile, and effective config match the archived pre-correction bdst-tu50-d16 baseline in docs/phase-2/experiment-results/cross-lane-inversion-d16-baseline.json. The single corrected candidate changes only the simulator's max-of-two fee-cap semantics; no controller floor is applied. This is a diagnostic comparison, not an equivalence test.
